request_payload.exposure_text: As a mother and taxpayer, I've always believed in supporting our military. But after seeing how selective service is being pushed as a 'shared responsibility,' I'm concerned. Our daughters shouldn't bear the same burden as sons when we have volunteers ready to serve. Let's focus on modernizing our all-volunteer force instead of reviving outdated draft policies. #NationalSecurity #FairnessMatters
